cmd.app_tour: Coj kuv mus saib ib ncig hauv app
cmd.app_tour_done: Pib qhia ib ncig — siv Tom Ntej los mus saib txhua yam.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Ib qho kev coj saib cov yam ntxwv tseem ceeb
cmd.clear_my_answers: Tshem kuv cov lus teb (pib dua)
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Lees paub hauv lub qhov rai los tshem koj cov lus teb.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Pib dua koj cov lus teb rau qhov kev ua no
cmd.clear_workspace: Tshem txhua yam thiab pib tshiab
cmd.clear_workspace_done: Twb tshem qhov chaw ua haujlwm lawm.
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Tshem cov ntsiab lus thiab keeb kwm tam sim no — nug ua ntej
cmd.create_lesson: Tsim ib zaj lus qhia (qhia rau kuv lub ntsiab)
cmd.create_lesson_done: Pib ib zaj lus qhia txog “
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot yuav coj cov kauj ruam tom ntej.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Pib qhov kev coj zaj lus qhia — AlloBot yuav nug koj lub ntsiab.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Pib qhov kev coj — hais ib lub ntsiab thiab qib
cmd.cycle_reading_theme: Hloov lub ntsiab kev nyeem ntawv
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Hloov mus los sov, sepia, tsaus, zoo rau dyslexia, thiab ntau ntxiv
cmd.export_pack: Rub zaj lus qhia pob coj los
cmd.export_pack_done: Tab tom npaj rub zaj lus qhia pob…
cmd.export_pack_hint: Rub zaj lus qhia ua ib daim ntawv puv ntoob
cmd.font_bigger: Ua kom cov ntawv loj dua
cmd.font_reset: Rov pib cov ntawv loj dua tshiab
cmd.font_reset_done: Twb rov pib cov ntawv loj raws li qub lawm.
cmd.font_reset_hint: Rov mus rau qhov loj qub
cmd.font_smaller: Ua kom cov ntawv me dua
cmd.generate_analysis_done: Tab tom tshuaj xyuas qhov chaw no…
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Tshuaj xyuas qhov chaw rau cov ntsiab lus tam sim no
cmd.generate_glossary: Tsim ib daim ntawv qhia lo lus
cmd.generate_glossary_done: Tab tom tsim daim ntawv qhia lo lus…
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Tsim daim ntawv qhia lo lus los ntawm cov ntsiab lus tam sim no
cmd.generate_outline: Tsim ib qho kev qhia tib neeg
cmd.generate_outline_done: Tab tom tsim qhov kev qhia…
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Tsim qhov kev qhia los ntawm cov ntsiab lus tam sim no
cmd.generate_quiz: Tsim ib daim ntawv soj ntsuam los ntawm qhov no
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Tab tom tsim daim ntawv soj ntsuam los ntawm cov ntsiab lus no…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Tsim daim ntawv soj ntsuam los ntawm cov ntsiab lus tam sim no

cmd.generate_simplified: Ua kom cov ntawv no yooj yim dua
cmd.generate_simplified_done: Tab tom tsim ib daim yooj yim dua…
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Tsim ib qib nyeem yooj yim dua — hais “mus rau qib N” rau ib lub hom phiaj

cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Kawm daim ntawv qhia lo lus no ua ib pob flashcard
cmd.line_spacing_less: Txo qhov nrug ntawm cov kab

cmd.open_accessibility_lab_done: Twb qhib lub Accessibility Lab lawm.

cmd.open_behavior_lens_hint: Soj ntsuam thiab tshuaj xyuas tus cwj pwm

cmd.open_class_analytics_done: Twb qhib kev txheeb xyuas chav kawm lawm.

cmd.open_class_session_done: Twb qhib lub qhov rai lub sijhawm chav kawm lawm.
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Pib lossis koom ib lub sijhawm chav kawm ncaj qha
cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Tshawb cov zaj lus qhia uas sib koom hauv zej zog
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Tsim thiab xa cov ntaub ntawv sib txawv
cmd.open_dynamic_assessment_hint: Ua ib qho kev ntsuam xyuas dynamic
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Twb qhib Educator Hub lawm — daim npav Document Pipeline nyob ze saum toj.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Cov cuab yeej qhia ntawv + daim npav Document Pipeline
cmd.open_export_menu: Qhib cov ntawv qhia xa tawm
cmd.open_export_menu_done: Twb qhib cov ntawv qhia xa tawm lawm.
cmd.open_export_menu_hint: Xa cov ntsiab lus tam sim no tawm
cmd.open_learning_hub_hint: Cov kev ua si, kev xyaum, thiab cuab yeej kawm
cmd.open_lumen: Qhib Lumen (daim ntawv cov ntaub ntawv)
cmd.open_lumen_done: Twb qhib Lumen hauv lub STEM Lab lawm.
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Hloov cov ntaub ntawv ntsuam xyuas ua daim duab kos
cmd.open_notebook_done: Twb qhib phau ntawv sau lawm.
cmd.open_notebook_hint: Cov ntawv sau thiab cov ntaub ntawv khaws cia
cmd.open_persona_chat_done: Twb qhib kev xam phaj Persona lawm.
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Xam phaj ib tug cwj pwm AI txog lub ntsiab no
cmd.open_project_settings: Qhib cov chaw teeb txoj haujlwm
cmd.open_project_settings_done: Twb qhib cov chaw teeb txoj haujlwm lawm.
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI, kev hais lus, thiab kev tswj Socratic raws txhua txoj haujlwm
cmd.open_roster_done: Twb qhib daim npe chav kawm lawm.
cmd.open_roster_hint: Tswj koj cov pab pawg chav kawm
cmd.open_sel_hub_hint: Cov cuab yeej kawm txog kev sib raug zoo thiab kev xav
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Cov cuab yeej science thiab lej sib tham tau
cmd.open_storyforge_hint: Kev sau ntawv tsim tsa raws kev coj
cmd.open_study_timer_done: Twb qhib lub sijhawm kawm lawm.
cmd.open_study_timer_hint: Ib lub sijhawm rau kev mloog / so
cmd.open_submission_inbox_done: Twb qhib lub thawv xa tuaj lawm.
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Tshuaj xyuas cov haujlwm tub ntxhais kawm tau xa tuaj
cmd.open_symbol_studio_hint: Cov phaj AAC thiab kev txhawb pom kev
cmd.open_text_settings_done: Twb qhib cov chaw teeb ntawv lawm.
cmd.open_text_settings_hint: Cov kev xaiv ntawv, kev nrug, thiab xim
cmd.open_translate_done: Twb qhib lub qhov rai txhais lus lawm.
cmd.open_translate_hint: Txhais cov ntsiab lus tam sim no
cmd.open_voice_settings_done: Twb qhib cov chaw teeb suab lawm.
cmd.open_wizard: Pib qhov kev coj tsim zaj lus qhia
cmd.open_wizard_done: Twb pib qhov kev coj tsim zaj lus qhia lawm.
cmd.open_wizard_hint: Tsim zaj lus qhia ib kauj ruam zuj zus
cmd.pipeline_downloads: Mus rau cov rub tawm pipeline
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Feem rub tawm — daim PDF muaj tag uas npaj txhij rau sib qhia.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_hint: Nqis mus rau feem Rub Tawm
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Rov kho kev nkag tau yooj yim dua
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Tab tom rov kho dua ib zaug…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Rov kho dua ib zaug los thawb cov ntsiab kom siab dua
cmd.pipeline_issues_hint: Hais cov teeb meem seem saum toj
cmd.pipeline_issues_more2: ntxiv hauv lub vam Teeb Meem.
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Feem ntawd tsis nyob ntawm nplooj tam sim no.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc: Pib dua nrog ib daim ntaub ntawv tshiab
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Twb tshem lawm — rub ib daim ntaub ntawv tshiab los pib.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Tshem qhov tshwm sim no thiab rub ib daim ntawv tshiab
cmd.pipeline_score: Kuv cov ntsiab kev nkag tau yooj yim yog dab tsi?
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Hais qhov ua ntej → tom qab tam sim no
cmd.pipeline_stop: Nres qhov kev kho tab tom khiav
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Yuav nres tom qab thawj kauj rov tam sim no.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Nres tom qab thawj kauj rov tam sim no — khaws cov uas ua tiav lawm
cmd.pipeline_tour: Coj kuv mus saib ib ncig cov tshwm sim no
cmd.pipeline_tour_done: Pib qhia ib ncig cov tshwm sim.
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: Ib qho kev qhia 60-vib nas ntsis txog cov tshwm sim kho
cmd.pipeline_verification: Mus rau kev txheeb xyuas pipeline
cmd.pipeline_verification_hint: Nqis mus rau feem Txheeb Xyuas
cmd.read_this_page: Nyeem nplooj no rau kuv mloog
cmd.read_this_page_done: Twb qhib tus nyeem nplooj lawm — xaiv qhov chaw pib.
cmd.report_problem_done: Twb qhib tus qhia teeb meem lawm.
cmd.set_font_size: Teem qhov loj ntawv (hais ib tus lej)
cmd.set_font_size_hint: piv txwv “teem qhov loj ntawv ua 20” (10–32)
cmd.stop_reading_done: Twb nres kev nyeem nrov lawm.
cmd.stop_reading_hint: Cuam tshuam qhov nyeem ntawv-mus-ua-suab tam sim no
cmd.submit_work_done: Tab tom qhib lub qhov rai xa…
cmd.submit_work_hint: Xa koj cov haujlwm rau koj tus xib fwb
cmd.switch_theme: Hloov lub ntsiab (lub teeb / tsaus / sib txawv heev)
cmd.switch_theme_done: Twb hloov lub ntsiab lawm — hloov mus los lub teeb, ces tsaus, ces sib txawv heev.
cmd.switch_theme_hint: Hloov mus los lub teeb → tsaus → sib txawv heev
cmd.toggle_animations: Kaw cov duab txav (txo kev txav)
cmd.toggle_animations_done: Twb hloov cov duab txav lawm.
cmd.toggle_bot_done: Twb hloov kev pom AlloBot lawm.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync: Qhib lossis kaw kev sib txuas huab
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Tab tom qhib lub qhov rai tso cai sib txuas huab — lees paub ntawd los qhib nws.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Sib txuas koj cov haujlwm rau huab (nug kev tso cai thawj zaug)
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_off: Twb kaw kev sib txuas huab lawm.
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_done: Twb hloov daim npog xim lawm.
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Hloov mus los ib daim npog xim mos hla nplooj
cmd.toggle_dictation_done: Twb hloov kev hais lus sau lawm.
cmd.toggle_dictation_hint: Hais los xwb tsis txhob ntaus ntawv
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Ua kom txhua yam tsaus tsuav nyob li cov ntsiab lus
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Twb hloov hom pab lawm — nyem ib lub khawm twg los kawm txog nws.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Nyem txhua yam los kawm nws ua dab tsi
cmd.toggle_line_focus_done: Twb hloov kev mloog ib kab lawm.
cmd.toggle_line_focus_hint: Ua kom ib kab ci ib zaug
cmd.toggle_mute: Kaw lossis qhib tag nrho suab
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_done: Twb hloov tus pas nyeem ntawv lawm.
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Ib kab coj txav tau rau kev taug
cmd.toggle_socratic_done: Twb hloov kev sib tham Socratic lawm.
cmd.toggle_socratic_hint: Ib tug phooj ywg kawm uas nug ua ntej
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_done: Twb hloov kev txhawb pom kev lawm.
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_hint: Cov duab qhia nrog cov ntawv
cmd.translate_document: Txhais daim ntaub ntawv no (hais ib hom lus)
cmd.translate_document_done2: thiab taw rau lub khawm — nias Txhais los ua nws. (Kev txhais siv AI quota, yog li qhov nyem nyob ntawm koj.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Sau hom lus ua ntej thiab taw rau lub khawm
cmd.translate_document_pick: Twb taw rau cov tswj kev txhais — xaiv ib hom lus thiab nias Txhais.
cmd.undo_settings: Thim kuv qhov kev hloov chaw teeb kawg
cmd.undo_settings_done: Twb rov qab koj cov chaw teeb yav dhau (yog tias muaj qhov hloov los thim).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Rov qab cov chaw teeb zaj lus qhia yav dhau (tsis yog cov ntsiab lus tsim tawm)
cmd.voice_start_done: Tswj suab qhib lawm. Hais ib qho lus xws li “ntawv loj dua” lossis “qhib educator hub”. Hais “tsum mloog” los xaus.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot mloog cov lus txog thaum koj nres nws
cmd.voice_stop_done: Tswj suab kaw lawm — twb tso lub microphone lawm.
cmd.zen_on_done: Hom zen qhib lawm — nias Ctrl+K thiab ua “tawm zen” los rov qab.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Zais txhua yam tsuav nyob li cov ntsiab lus
palette.confirm: ⚠ Nias Enter dua los lees paub
palette.ctx.content: Ntawm no — cov ntsiab lus no
palette.ctx.pipeline: Ntawm no — Cov tshwm sim Pipeline
palette.footer: Txhua qhov haujlwm raug tshaj tawm. Ctrl+K hloov.
palette.group.create: Tsim los ntawm cov ntsiab lus no
palette.no_match: Tsis muaj lus haujlwm phim. Kev sib tham bot (thiab tsis ntev no suab) nkag siab cov lus thov dawb.
palette.placeholder: Ntaus ib lo lus haujlwm — “ntawv loj dua”, “educator hub”, “nyeem nplooj no”…
cmd.set_ui_language: Hloov cov lus ntawm lub vijtsam
cmd.set_ui_language_done: Tau coj koj mus rau qhov xaiv lus nyob saum toj — xaiv koj hom lus ntawd.
cmd.set_ui_language_hint: Mus ncaj rau qhov xaiv lus nyob saum toj
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: Qhov xaiv cov lus ntawm lub vijtsam nyob ntawm txoj kab xaim saum toj.
